prompt:
????? ?????? ???? SQL-?????? PostgreSQL. ????????? ?????? ??????? roads ? repairs, ??? WITH, ??? CTE, ??? ???????????, ??? UNION, ??? ????????????. ?????? ?????? ???? ???????????? ?????????? ??????? ? ???????????? ?????? ????????? ???????:
SELECT roads.road_name, roads.region, repairs.repair_date, repairs.total_amount FROM roads LEFT JOIN repairs ON roads.id = repairs.road_id ORDER BY roads.road_name, repairs.repair_date
raw:
WITH road_repairs AS (
    SELECT 
        r.road_name, 
        r.region, 
        p.repair_date, 
        p.total_amount,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.id ORDER BY p.repair_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM roads r
    LEFT JOIN repairs p ON r.id = p.road_id
),
latest_repairs AS (
    SELECT road_name, region, repair_date, total_amount
    FROM road_repairs
    WHERE rn = 1
),
region_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT road_name) AS road_count,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_repair_cost
    FROM road_repairs
    GROUP BY region
),
combined_data AS (
    SELECT 
        road_name,
        region,
        repair_date,
        total_amount,
        'latest_repair' AS data_type
    FROM latest_repairs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        NULL AS road_name,
        region,
        NULL AS repair_date,
        total_repair_cost AS total_amount,
        'region_summary' AS data_type
    FROM region_summary
)
SELECT * FROM combined_data
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN data_type = 'latest_repair' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
    region,
    road_name,
    repair_date;

FROM roads 
LEFT JOIN repairs ON roads.id = repairs.road_id 
ORDER BY roads.road_name, repairs.repair_date
